name: HOOKER FURNISHINGS Corp
summary: Hooker Furnishings Corporation, incorporated in Virginia in 1924, is a designer, marketer, and importer of casegoods, leather furniture, fabric-upholstered furniture, lighting, accessories, and home decor for residential, hospitality, and contract markets. The company operates through three segments: Hooker Branded, Home Meridian, and Domestic Upholstery, with brands including Hooker Furniture, Pulaski Furniture, Samuel Lawrence, Bradington-Young, HF Custom, Shenandoah Furniture, and Sunset West. It also domestically manufactures premium custom upholstered and outdoor furniture.

products.name: Hooker Casegoods
products.description: Home entertainment, home office, accent, dining and bedroom furniture at upper-medium price points under the Hooker Furniture brand.

products.name: Hooker Upholstery
products.description: Imported upholstered furniture targeted at the upper-medium price range.

products.name: Pulaski Furniture
products.description: Casegoods covering bedroom, dining room, accent and display cabinets at medium price points.

products.name: Samuel Lawrence Furniture
products.description: Value-conscious bedroom, dining room, home office and youth furnishings.

products.name: Samuel Lawrence Hospitality
products.description: Designer and supplier of hotel furnishings targeted toward four- and five-star hotels.

products.name: Bradington-Young
products.description: Upscale motion and stationary leather furniture specializing in seating.

products.name: HF Custom
products.description: Fashion forward custom fabric upholstery including chairs, sofas, sectionals, recliners and accent pieces.

products.name: Shenandoah Furniture
products.description: Upscale private label upholstered sectionals, sofas, chairs, beds and dining chairs for lifestyle specialty retailers.

products.name: Sunset West
products.description: Designer and manufacturer of stylish high-quality outdoor furniture.

products.name: H Contract
products.description: Upholstered seating and casegoods for upscale senior living and assisted living facilities.

products.name: BOBO Intriguing Objects
products.description: Home decor business acquired during fiscal 2024.
